{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=A party fanatic's best invention. With this shell and a portable speaker, you can dance wherever you want!
|affct=TECH
|hard=DEF
|source=EDM Event: Tour Super Gacha Machine (2%)
|color=purple
|earth=7
|water=6
|fire=6
|wind=7
|form=Dragon
|element=Fire
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=ATK
}}
